description: Agent makes a numeric valuation claim (EPS $2.50, P/E 25x) in a finding but provides no evidence refs.

findings.text: ACME Corp has EPS of $250 and trades at a P/E of 250x, implying a fair value of $625 per share.

risks.name: Earnings miss
risks.description: EPS could miss estimates if margins compress.

metadata.notes: numeric_claim_issue should fire because EPS and P/E appear in finding text with no evidence refs.
